text:
ly weighed, appropriate
evidence sifted and then the inference drawn. For instance,
the rules given above for predicting the results likely to
happen during the Dasa of the lord of a particular bhava
can merely serve as a code of reference. With these at his
command, the clever reader will have to use his discretion
and lay down a ruling as he can best draw a conclusion
from them. The greatest mistake that one can commit is to
apply verbatim the principles to actual charts.
It has been given above that when the lord of the 6th
joins the 5th lord in the 5th, the person will incur the
enmity of his son or father. Supposing, Lagna is Pisces.
Then the 6th lord will be the Sun, who is Pitrukaraka and
the 5th lord is the Moon who is Matrukaraka. The
association having reference to 5th house, or Cancer, the
Moon is well placed. During the Dasa of the Sun, therefore,
the person, whose enmity will be incurred, will of course be
the father of the native.

Concerning the Sixth House 263
